action.content:
Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise. At the end of your response, explicitly add a postscript starting with P.P.S

Finish your entire response with this exact phrase: Hope you agree with me.
action.label: context

action.content:
Subject: Request for Salary Review

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to formally request a review of my current compensation. I have been with the company for [Number] years and have been proud to contribute to our team's success. Over this time, I have taken on increasing responsibilities, including [mention 1-2 key achievements or new responsibilities], and I am confident that my contributions have added significant value to the department.

Given my performance and the current market standards for this role, I would like to discuss the possibility of adjusting my salary to better reflect my experience and contributions. I am very committed to our team and the company's goals, and I believe this adjustment would be a great step forward for both of us.

I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss this matter with you at your earliest convenience. Please let me know what time works best for a brief meeting.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

P.P.S. I have attached a brief summary of my recent projects and achievements for your reference.

Hope you agree with me.
action.label: response
